column_classification_rules.ordinal: explicit ordered categories provided or monotonic rank semantics

relationship_and_quality_checks.outlier_method: IQR with 1.5*IQR fences and robust z-score (MAD)
functional_dependency_tests: group-level variance checks for dependent variables

decision_logic.reason: small sample regime; robust likelihood-based fitting with lower overfitting risk
mixed-type tabular modeling with conditional generation for moderate datasets
better mode coverage and complex dependency modeling at scale

requires: measured severe mode collapse in GAN validation
compute constraints incompatible with default choice

missing_value_handling.numerical: median imputation; add missingness indicator if missing_rate > 0.05
missing_value_handling.datetime: forward-fill only if temporal continuity is valid, else explicit missing token

encoding.categorical_low_cardinality: one-hot encoding for copula baselines; native embeddings for CTGAN/Diffusion pipelines
encoding.categorical_high_cardinality: frequency encoding for diagnostics + embedding layers in generator

scaling.heavy_tailed_or_bounded: quantile transform or MinMax for strictly bounded features

preprocessing.train_validation_split: stratified split if target exists; otherwise random 80/20

training_strategy.ctgan_conditional_sampling: inverse-frequency condition sampling to improve minority category coverage
training_strategy.diffusion_noise_schedule: cosine with clipped betas for stability
training_strategy.checkpointing: save best model by validation distribution score

hardware.ctgan: single GPU recommended; CPU possible for small data

class_strategy.if_imbalanced: conditional oversampling to target minority ratio between 0.35 and 0.5 unless domain requires real priors

constraints.range_constraints: clip to observed valid domain or business-defined hard bounds
constraints.type_constraints: integer rounding for discrete columns; valid category whitelist enforcement
relational_constraints: dependency constraints learned from functional checks

generation_plan.post_generation_filtering: reject records violating hard constraints and resample

statistical_similarity.numerical: two-sample KS test per numerical feature (alpha=0.05; report effect sizes)
statistical_similarity.categorical: chi-square test per categorical feature with expected-count safeguards

dependency_similarity.correlation: compare Pearson/Spearman matrices; report Frobenius norm difference

ml_utility.protocol: train on synthetic, test on held-out real; compare against train-on-real baseline
ml_utility.acceptance_band: synthetic model performance >= 90% of real-data baseline unless domain specifies otherwise

privacy_checks.membership_inference: optional attack simulation for sensitive datasets

retrain_triggers: data drift (PSI > 0.2 or significant KS/Chi-square shift)
reusability.versioning: semantic versioning with data snapshot hash and model lineage
